title: AI Zombie
description: Uses the default AI provider to create a cinematic zombie transformation.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a cinematic zombie-apocalypse portrait using realistic practical horror makeup. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial structure, pose, camera angle, and main framing while adding an undead pallor, subtle facial cracks, haunting eyes, torn weathered clothing, an abandoned urban environment, dramatic horror lighting, detailed skin texture, and premium movie special-effects realism.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, extra limbs, extra fingers, duplicate body parts, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, extreme gore, exposed organs, dismemberment, excessive blood, graphic violence, unrecognizable face, pixelated, low detail, cropped subject
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. abandoned mall, cinematic horror lighting...
